Synonyms for swarm

an enormous number of persons gathered together

Synonyms

  • crowd
  • crush
  • drove
  • flock
  • horde
  • mass
  • mob
  • multitude
  • press
  • ruck
  • throng

a very large number of things grouped together

Synonyms

  • army
  • cloud
  • crowd
  • drove
  • flock
  • horde
  • host
  • legion
  • mass
  • mob
  • multitude
  • ruck
  • score
  • throng

to come or go in large numbers

Synonyms

  • flood
  • pour
  • throng
  • troop

to be abundantly filled or richly supplied

Synonyms

  • abound
  • bristle
  • crawl
  • flow
  • overflow
  • pullulate
  • teem

Synonyms for swarm

a moving crowd

Synonyms

  • drove
  • horde

Related Words

  • crowd

a group of many things in the air or on the ground

Synonyms

  • cloud

Related Words

  • group
  • grouping
  • insect
  • infestation
  • plague

be teeming, be abuzz

Synonyms

  • teem

Related Words

  • hum
  • buzz
  • crawl

move in large numbers

Synonyms

  • spill out

References in periodicals archive ?
The swarm is on a plant in the garden, directly outside the back door.
Family welcome bees who've found home in garden; to see a video, visit walesonline.co.uk
Hywel Jones and daughter Nia and (inset) the swarm of bees they found hanging in a tree
Honey we've lost the bees! PLEA TO HELP FIND 20,000-STRONG SWARM
Caringo Swarm is integrated and certified with Enterprise Vault as part of the Symantec Technology Enabled Program (STEP) and is included in the certified product listing in the STEP Partner directory.
Caringo provides software-based web-scale object storage
Caption: To use Swarmize, editors create a "swarm." From there, a developer builds a custom interactive with data collected from the swarm.
Building better data journalism: the Guardians Swarmize takes the headache out of surveys, and more
By using a custom-made swarm of robots with high-processing power embedded within the swarm, the Bristol team were able to discover which rules give rise to desired swarm behaviours.
University of Bristol: Inspired from nature - robots can now learn to swarm on the go
'Onboard evolution of understandable swarm behaviors' by S Jones, A Winfield, S Hauert and M Studley in Advanced Intelligent Systems [open access]: https://u7061146.ct.sendgrid.net/wf/click?upn=G62jSYfZdO-2F12d8lSllQB1KgTMuHgJc3UAeQNOZemS6hktiRrZcLusDW24qbmzzZXi7Ivl0eQP-2BJabDXZUdcX5ibEpBxAFvR-2Fb2FgtUP-2FyI-3D_aWDIlLU8GHIzAwNDuKucrMuHYFebTGQClVblHlWV0FGVHEobSeTgIFs7c-2FJ1PR-2F6lf0J7lcZGkaj8OQ4AUl1z-2FQNSja8Zy9BHe8wnLovMBIE4sIxIH6hXtczoBvl1040RGW5B1urOA2rrBuXutUUvz6Oc007SURNDi-2BCGhFHbSL9VTH4LiDD-2BOMSrFAq7vWbExCqVryQtl2XkSRa0MigTVqhc-2BNNQ1mH84JzQiyoFWrQRYN24LclEgFlcbWPFYoBj2XKoQTqC5tRPd1QFfM2IgY3h4Yf49PbT0B5ie-2BNCPONAFfqsIyo-2BW05aDTXKaOPmMBaSYKb1CIMWZaPKCi-2B8xjfVqsRjrVII5x4W-2BM7cbA-3D
Inspired from nature - robots can now learn to swarm on the go
Assistant manager Denisa Osacenco, originally from Romania, said she had been in an upstairs meeting when the swarm had peaked.
BUZZ AT BOOZER AS BEES SWARM PUB
Sciencing.com said: "This is not a threatening swarm, as they are simply moving in a group to locate the building site for their nest.
Giant swarm of wasps descends on city street
Beekeeper Brian Gall said: "When honey bees swarm they all cluster together so they're really easy to move.
Hive of activity as van abuzz with bee swarm
It is understood that the swarm is a colony of honey bees, which is formed when the queen bee leaves the colony with a large group of worker bees.
Woman and children too terrified to go outside after thousands of bees invade home; "The children have been going to their nan's to have a shower because they are too scared to go in the bathroom"
Amman, May 6 (Petra) -- The Agricultural Ministry announced it started fighting the 2nd swarm of locusts early Monday, stressing no other squadrons have entered into the country till now.
Authorities starts fighting 2nd "squadrons" of locusts
Egypt is preparing for a giant swarm of locusts to hit the nation - which has been compared to one of the plagues described in the Old Testament of the Bible.
Egypt about to be hit by a 'biblical' plague of locusts; Long periods of rain around neighbouring countries Sudan and Eritrea has sparked outbreak - which has been likened to one of the 10 plagues described in the Bible
In mid-January 2019, one swarm at least crossed the Red Sea to the northern coast of Saudi Arabia, and other swarms followed the first one about one week later.
FAO warns of desert locust raids in Egypt, Sudan, Saudi Arabia, Yemen
These swarm networks will not only raise the bar in terms of the technologies needed to defend organizations, but, like zero-day mining, they will also have an impact on the underlying criminal business model, allowing them to expand their opportunity.
Preparing for tomorrow's cyber threats
Swarm Technologies, a space startup which launched four tiny satellites without government authorisation earlier this year, will pay $900,000 to the US Treasury for the unapproved flight.
FCC levies fine on space startup for illegal satellite launch
